title: Tesla's 3, 6, 9 Obsession

content.quote: If you only knew the magnificence of 3, 6 and 9, then you would have a key to the universe.
content.author: Nikola Tesla

significance.title: Three-Phase Electricity (Real Engineering)
significance.description: Tesla invented the three-phase AC motor and electrical system. Three phases enable efficient power transmission and remain fundamental to the modern electrical grid today.

significance.title: Mathematical Patterns
significance.description: 3, 6, 9 are divisors and multiples with recurring mathematical relationships. Digital root of these numbers cycles: 3→6→9→3. Harmonic relationships in frequency ratios.

significance.title: Resonance & Vibration (Physics Foundation)
significance.description: Tesla believed in standing waves, resonance, and natural frequencies as keys to efficiency. The 3-6-9 sequence appears in harmonic overtone series and frequency relationships.

significance.title: Obsessive Personality (Behavioral)
significance.description: Tesla exhibited ritualistic behavior: walked around buildings 3 times before entering, only stayed in hotel rooms with numbers divisible by 3, meticulously documented his numerical obsessions.

reality_check.verified: Three-phase power system is real, engineered, and widely used.
reality_check.speculative: Mystical significance of 3-6-9 lacks scientific basis, though harmonic principles are sound.
reality_check.conclusion: Tesla was a brilliant engineer grounded in math and resonance (real), but his personal numerology was superstition (not verified).

source: Historical records, Tesla patents, biographical research
notes: Interesting intersection of verified engineering genius and pseudoscientific belief. Still studied by both historians and numerology enthusiasts.
